# Holistic Fitness Club

> HFC is a holistic training community built on eight codex principles, with progress tracking, leaderboards, mentor chat and community events.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of HFC — what the community offers and how to join.
- [Sign in](/login): Returning members sign in to access their account.
- [Join the Club](/signup): Create an HFC account and choose a training type (Online, Personal, Kids, Group).
